name: read_waivers
short_description: Read one or more DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC message waivers data sets from binary file(s)
full_help:
read_waivers

Description: 
Read one or more DRC/METHODOLOGY/CDC message waivers data sets from binary file(s)

Syntax: 
read_waivers  [-type <arg>] [-cleanup <arg>] [-file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-type]     Type of waiver - ALL, DRC, METHODOLOGY, CDC
  [-cleanup]  Type of waivers to cleanup - ALL, DRC, METHODOLOGY, CDC
  [-file]     Name of file to read waivers (or as TYPE.<filename>, if more 
              than one Type was saved
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Waiver, Object
